steps: Go to https://account.boldsign.com/signup and create a free account (or log in at https://account.boldsign.com)
In the left navigation pane, click 'API' then select 'API Key'
In the dialog that appears, optionally set an expiration date, choose the environment (Sandbox or Live), then click 'Generate Token'
Copy the generated API key immediately — store it securely

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your BoldSign API key, sent in the X-API-KEY request header

notes: Free sandbox account available for testing — no credit card required
You can generate up to 4 API keys (no more than 2 per environment)
Free plan users can only create Sandbox keys; Live keys require a paid plan
API keys can have an optional expiration date; without one they remain valid until deleted
Priced at $0.75 per sent document on pay-as-you-go plans

test_endpoint.description: Lists documents in your account — confirms the API key is valid
